notes: No API credits: deterministic relay; product BUILD prefers Codex CLI headless (ideHandoff.buildWorker=codex). Cursor CLI/IDE reserved for exceptions. Autonomous Git writes are disabled by default; publish intentionally from a bounded chapter branch. Run verify_build_worker.cmd + verify_codex.cmd. See PPE_NEAR_ZERO_API_OPERATOR_V1.md.

remoteBuildPolicy.notes: Headless Codex CLI on IDE_BUILD (buildWorker=codex). Mid-month boost still applies when autoRemoteBuild=false override. Record Cursor usage: ppe_remote_build_policy.cmd record --used-pct 0.15

desktopStack.notes: One supervisor process + detached workers; use run_ppe_headless_stack.cmd. See PPE_HEADLESS_STACK_V1.md.
